item.message: Skill descriptions were shortened to fit the 2% skills context budget. Codex can still see every skill, but some descriptions are shorter. Disable unused skills or plugins to leave more room for the rest.

item.text: I’ll inspect the existing schema and entity modules, then add shipments using the same live-database conventions and run the test suite.

item.command: /bin/zsh -lc "sed -n '1,240p' src/schema.mjs && sed -n '1,240p' src/orders.mjs && sed -n '1,240p' src/accounts.mjs && git status --short"
/bin/zsh -lc "sed -n '1,240p' src/schema.mjs && sed -n '1,240p' src/orders.mjs && sed -n '1,240p' src/accounts.mjs && git status --short"

item.text: Shipments now follows the existing insert-and-query module pattern, with a MongoDB JSON-schema validator for all requested fields. I’m running the live-database regression suite.

item.text: The suite exposed a pre-existing syntax defect in `schema.mjs`: each `createCollection` call closes one object level too few, so the module cannot load. I’ll correct those identical closings alongside the new collection, then rerun the tests.

item.command: /bin/zsh -lc 'npm test && git diff --check && git diff -- src/schema.mjs src/shipments.mjs'
/bin/zsh -lc 'npm test && git diff --check && git diff -- src/schema.mjs src/shipments.mjs'

item.text:
Implemented shipments support:

- Added `shipments` collection schema and validation in [schema.mjs](/Users/rom.iluz/Dev/sql-hidden-cost/benchmark/runs-complex/new-entity/mongo/codex/repeat-2/workspace/src/schema.mjs).
- Added [shipments.mjs](/Users/rom.iluz/Dev/sql-hidden-cost/benchmark/runs-complex/new-entity/mongo/codex/repeat-2/workspace/src/shipments.mjs) with `createShipment`, `getShipment`, and `getShipmentsByOrder`.
- Corrected the existing collection-call closing syntax in `schema.mjs`, which prevented the module from loading.

`npm test` passes, including live DB shipment CRUD and existing-entity regression coverage.
